creator: phk@critter.freebsd.dk
text:
Cron shouts in /var/log/messages, that's annoying:

Mar 15 21:05:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[777]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun) 
Mar 15 21:10:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[826]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun) 
Mar 15 21:11:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[830]: (operator) CMD (/usr/libexec/save-entropy) 
Mar 15 21:15:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[897]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun) 
Mar 15 21:20:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[914]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun) 
Mar 15 21:22:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[922]: (operator) CMD (/usr/libexec/save-entropy) 
Mar 15 21:25:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[980]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun) 
Mar 15 21:30:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[1000]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun) 
Mar 15 21:33:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[1015]: (operator) CMD (/usr/libexec/save-entropy) 
Mar 15 21:35:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[1062]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun) 
Mar 15 21:40:00 <cron.info> critter /USR/SBIN/CRON[1099]: (root) CMD (/usr/libexec/atrun)
